title: Triton Squad
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Triton}} {{Organization |image=[[File:Triton_Squad.jpg]] |name=Triton Squad |type= |founder= |leader=*[[Triton Squad Leader]]{{CWACite|4|Descent (comic story)}} *[[Triton Squad's second commander]]''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' {{C|[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PS2]]/[[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]] version}} |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations= |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] |restored=c. 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] and [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]][[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} **[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'' states that all [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] were part of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]. *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] }} {{Quote|Lord Vader, Triton Squad reporting for duty, sir.''"
"''Very good. Follow me, Commander.|Triton Squad Commander and Darth Vader|}} '''Triton Squad''' was originally a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|military]] unit that consisted of nine [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], including a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]]. The [[Squad/Legends|squad]] survived the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Civil war|conflict]] known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and became an [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial]] unit under the Republic's successor state, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==History== Soon after [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|reorganized]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] into the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],{{Film|III}} Triton [[Squad/Legends|Squad]] was dispatched on an assignment to execute the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. A group of Wookiee warriors, led by [[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], retaliated and, after a brief skirmish, lured the [[clone stormtrooper]]s into the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Ultimately, the [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] became the hunted, and the entire squad was massacred, resulting in the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of all nine [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]], including their [[Triton Squad Leader|clone commander]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] the Empire launched its [[Battle of Kashyyyk (c. 18 BBY)|invasion of Kashyyyk]], a new Triton Squad had been formed and consisted of several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] under the leadership of a [[Triton Squad's second commander|new commander]]. It was deployed to the Wookiee home planet as a unit within the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]], an elite [[Division/Legends|division]] of [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] led by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. During the fighting, the squad accompanied Vader during the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] search for a [[Kento Marek|fugitive Jedi]] who had been hiding on Kashyyyk for some time. ==Equipment== Although most [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] upgraded to [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II battle armor]] by the second half of the [[Cloning/Legends|Clone]] Wars, eight of the nine members of Triton Squad still utilized [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. The squad's original [[Commander/Legends|commander]] wore a customized version of the [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class armor]]. They were armed with the [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]], the standard [[Blaster rifle/Legends|weapon]] of the clone troopers.''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' During the Imperial attack on Kashyyyk, the new Triton Squad's soldiers were equipped with an early version of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]]. By then, the squad was part of the 501st [[Legion/Legends|Legion]] as well, allowing its members to add the 501st's distinctive [[Color/Legends|blue]] markings to their suits. Their standard weapon at the time was the [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]. [[File:Triton.jpg|thumb|Triton Squad (''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'' (PS2, Wii))]] ==Behind the scenes== Triton Squad first appeared in ''[[Descent (comic story)|Descent]]'', a story from [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' Volume 4]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] series. It was written by [[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]], the director of the [[2008]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''. Triton Squad appeared in the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|Playstation 2]], Playstation Portable, and [[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]] versions of ''The Force Unleashed''. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|4|Descent (comic story)}} {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' {{C|[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PS2]]/[[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]] version}} ==Sources== *''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Triton Trupp |nl=Triton Squad |pt=Legends:Esquadrão Tritão |tr=Dinamit Mangası }} [[Category:Galactic Republic commando squads]] [[Category:Imperial Army squads]] [[Category:Stormtrooper units]]
